exercises.stem: ___ she was cooking, the doorbell rang.
exercises.analysis: cooking 是延续性动作，while 强调「在...期间」，更适合引导延续性动作的从句。

exercises.stem: I will wait here until you ___ back.
exercises.analysis: until 引导的时间从句遵循主将从现原则，用一般现在时 come。

exercises.stem: Please wash your hands ___ you eat dinner.
exercises.analysis: 句意是「吃饭前洗手」，before 表示「在...之前」，符合语境。

exercises.stem: We can say: "I will call you when I will arrive."
exercises.analysis: when 引导的时间从句不能用 will，应该用一般现在时代替将来时。正确形式：I will call you when I arrive.

segments: I didn't go to bed ___1___ I finished my homework.
She was listening to music ___2___ she was doing her homework.
exercises.analysis: 第一句 not...until 表示「直到...才」，用 until。第二句 doing homework 是延续性动作，用 while 表示「在...期间」。

exercises.question: 用正确的时态填空并说明理由：I will send you the photo as soon as I ___ (get) home.
exercises.referenceAnswer: get。理由：as soon as 引导的时间状语从句遵循「主将从现」原则，主句用一般将来时 will send，从句用一般现在时 get。
scoringPoints: 正确使用一般现在时 get
能说明 as soon as 的含义
